nasb.text: Whoever touches any thing on which she sits shall wash his clothes and bathe in water and be unclean until evening.

esv.text: And whoever touches anything on which she sits shall wash his clothes and bathe himself in water and be unclean until the evening.

cnv.text: 觸摸她坐過的任何家具，都要洗淨自己的衣服，用水洗澡，並且不潔淨到晚上。

ccb.text: 人若碰到她坐过的地方，也不洁净，必须洗衣、沐浴，等到傍晚才能洁净。
